title: Is NATURE The Most Advanced Quantum Computer?
summary: This brief interview segment discusses how nature performs quantum computations that are impossible for current technology to replicate, touching on the multiverse interpretation as a possible explanation for quantum state storage. The conversation explores the mystery of how quantum computing works even though we can engineer quantum systems.

key_claims.claim: Nature performs quantum state bookkeeping that is computationally impossible for current technology to replicate
Quantum computing simulates nature more accurately than classical computing
We can engineer quantum computers but do not fully understand why they work
